title: JRose Collections Kids Mega Lucky Bag 3 Pack Set – Space, Jungle & Princess Bags with 8 Surprises Each – Toys, Games, Crafts, Stickers & Activity Sheets – Party Bag Fillers & Fun Activities
features: 🎉 3 Pack Mega Lucky Bag Bundle – Includes Space, Jungle & Princess themes, each packed with toys, puzzles, stickers, and crafts.
🧩 8 Surprises in Every Bag – Each bag is filled with toys, activity sheets, stickers, and games for hours of fun.
✏️ Free Activity Sheets – Each bag comes with themed puzzles, colouring pages, word searches, mazes, or matching games that keep kids learning while they play.
🧸 Perfect for Kids Ages 3+ – Great as party bag fillers, classroom rewards, travel activities, or surprise treats to keep little ones entertained.
✅ Safe & UKCA/CE Certified – All contents meet UK safety standards; not suitable for children under 3 years.
description: Product description Blast off into fun with this 3 Pack Kids Mega Lucky Bag Set, featuring Space, Jungle & Princess themes. Each brightly designed bag is filled with 8 fun surprises, from toys and stickers to puzzles, games, and craft activities. Every bag also includes a free themed activity sheet packed with exciting challenges such as colouring, mazes, tracing, and word games. Kids can learn while they play, sparking imagination and creativity. Perfect as party bag fillers, classroom prizes, travel entertainment, or surprise treats, these Mega Lucky Bags provide variety and excitement in every set. ⚠️ Safety Warning: Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts. Use under adult supervision. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts – choking hazard. Use under adult supervision.
